WITH salary_cleaned AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        customer AS company,
        CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(
            CAST(total_amt_usd AS TEXT), '$', ''), '₹', ''), ',', ''), ' ', ''), 'INR', ''), 'Rs.', ''), 'Rs', ''), 'INR ', ''), 'Rs ', ''), 'INR.', ''), '.', '') AS REAL) AS salary
    FROM web_orders o
    JOIN web_accounts a ON o.account_id = a.id
    JOIN web_sales_reps s ON a.sales_rep_id = s.id
    JOIN hardw...
